title: Fireblocks Transaction
description: A Fireblocks Transaction represents any digital-asset movement initiated through Fireblocks — transfers, raw signings, contract calls, swaps, payouts. Each transaction is bound by the workspace Policy Engine and signed by the MPC quorum.

externalTxId.description: Idempotency / external reference identifier supplied by the API client.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the transaction.

subStatus.description: Detailed reason for the current status (e.g. INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS, AUTHORIZER_NOT_FOUND).

operation.description: Type of operation Fireblocks is executing.

assetId.description: Fireblocks asset id (e.g. BTC, ETH, USDC_ETH, USDC_POLYGON).

amount.description: Amount to transfer in the asset's native unit.

amountUSD.description: USD-equivalent value of the amount at the time of submission.

netAmount.description: Net amount after deducting network fees.

fee.description: Network fee charged in the asset's native unit.

networkFee.description: Network gas/fee paid to miners or validators.

note.description: Free-form note attached to the transaction (visible in Console).

createdAt.description: Unix epoch millis when the transaction was created.

lastUpdated.description: Unix epoch millis when the transaction was last updated.

createdBy.description: User or API key identifier that initiated the transaction.

signedBy.description: List of signers participating in the MPC quorum.

rejectedBy.description: User who rejected the transaction, if applicable.

authorizationInfo.description: Quorum approval state of the transaction under the workspace policy engine.

exchangeTxId.description: External exchange transaction identifier, if routed via an exchange account.

addressType.description: Destination address type, e.g. ONE_TIME or WHITELISTED.

extraParameters.description: Operation-specific parameters (raw signing message, contract call data, etc.).
